title: Jinbe Sends a Warning
description: On pages 6–9, this part follows Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Chopper, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Fish-Men, Luffy. The core story beat is jinbe sends a warning.
scene: The scene centers on jinbe sends a warning, with Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Chopper, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Fish-Men, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We have received reports of a number of legal immigrants. Has anyone here seen them?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Akkaaaaaaaaa Mambo! Whooo whooo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you've seen then, let us know- re-mi-fa-so- la-fi-do-!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Maaaaan!! I'd sure to hang out here awhile!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If they haven't, then alas-so-fa-mi- Re-Doooo!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Ryluguu kingdom three brothers of the family Neptunee eldest brother FUCKABOSHI (a shark merman)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: youngest brother MANBOSHI (an opah merman)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: middle brother RVUBOSHI a giant oarfish merman)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....hmm........ I see. Well, thank you all anyway. We will continue our search elsewhere... the border guard must have been mistaken...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: N... NO...!! I'm afraid we haven't seen anyone like that here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So important that the princes themselves must come searching for them?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm... well... it is still not certain that they are the individuals I suspect...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Indeed that is so- fa-re-mi- DOO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's dance! Akka- Mambo!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: ...?!...?! those are the three big shots from the Neptunee army!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are they doing here?! this is a pain...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I apologise for Interru- Pring your Trivolities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, it was our pleasure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's dance again sometimes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And now we shall go-mi- re-do!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Sanjiii!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaa AaaahHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji- Chan?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That was way too much blood! Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, crap... the tension he was suppressing must have burst out all at once!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That man...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no doubt about it...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the pirate, straw hat luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ammo- Knights!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyone who

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Well, damn... they really are here!! It's the straw hats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What now? They're going to capture 'em before we do!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: But we can't start a fight with the Neptunee army in a place like this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's the princes, of all people...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Hold on a minute!!! We apologise for entering the island illegally!! But could you wait before arresting us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is urgent!!! Is there anyone here who could provide a blood donation?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If my friend doesn't receive one soon... He'll be dead within a matter of minutes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: His blood is type s, rh negative! I know it's a little rare...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But is there anyone here with a blood type match?! or is mermaid and fishman blood not compatible with humans...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! You've gotta help us, please!! I'm begging you!! Sanji needs blood, fast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Quickly!!! Is there anyone at all?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He can't die in such a ridiculous way...!!! somebody, help!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Chopper-chin! Mermaids and Fishmen both have the same type of blood as humans! A blood transfusion should be possible... but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hamoha Mohamo.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Foolish humans!!! What is this outrageous nonsense??!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Why would any fishman or merman...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...ever give his own precious blood to save an inferior human?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why, if they ever considered it, the human- haters would subject them to the midnight penalty!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's those guys with the sea monsters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Caimie?!!

summary: Jinbe Sends a Warning. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
